title: John Viverito
compiled_truth: John Viverito is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-02 to 2001-11-29), John Viverito sent 63 and received 844 emails, totalling 907 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (35), [Alan Aronowitz](people/alan-aronowitz) (29), [Jonathan Whitehead](people/jonathan-whitehead) (20), [Susan Musch](people/susan-musch) (14), [Tom Moran](people/tom-moran) (10). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, inbox.
